discovery.name: Composition I
discovery.statement: The first grammar FoldForge found: individually held works disclose a collective field when ordered by average perceived light.

evidence.inclusionPolicy: all currently held contracts except repository-owned exclusions
mediaAuthority: canonical token metadata when provider media is absent

transformations.output: average perceived luminance using Rec. 709 coefficients
equal square grayscale field with color revealed by direct focus

presentation.title: Holdings composition
presentation.interfaceStatement: Every visible work / average luminance / dark → light
presentation.differenceRule: No work receives different scale without evidence and an explicit grammar.

lineage.cache: Luminance may be cached by owner, token identity, and media URL. A changed media URL requires recalculation.
lineage.revisionTrigger: A transformation or interpretation change requires a new grammar version. A holding change produces a new composition state under the same grammar.

authority.claims: This ordering is a reproducible observation of average image luminance for the selected archive state.
authority.doesNotClaim: Luminance determines artistic value, chronology, rarity, intention, or final meaning.
